annotation.reason: Studio rendering section gained a 'Multi-lane composed views' bullet — operator-pinned subsets of lanes can be tiled side-by-side on the desk. The Group rendering bullet also gained a 'Group multi-lane review' entry: a group's review surface renders its members in a coordinated multi-lane composition (one column per lane the group spans). Phase 4 in Tasks now lists 'multi-lane composed views' as part of the studio render scope; Phase 6 lists 'group multi-lane composition'.
